message: Installer: handle tag tarballs; release builds are CGO-free

files.patch:
@@ -46,8 +46,8 @@ jobs:
       - name: Build sysmon-go binaries
         run: |
           mkdir -p dist
-          GOOS=linux GOARCH=amd64 go build -o dist/sysmon-linux-amd64 ./cmd/sysmon
-          GOOS=linux GOARCH=arm64 go build -o dist/sysmon-linux-arm64 ./cmd/sysmon
+          CGO_ENABLED=0 GOOS=linux GOARCH=amd64 go build -o dist/sysmon-linux-amd64 ./cmd/sysmon
+          CGO_ENABLED=0 GOOS=linux GOARCH=arm64 go build -o dist/sysmon-linux-arm64 ./cmd/sysmon
           ls -lh dist
 
       - name: Generate checksums

@@ -1177,7 +1177,11 @@ EOF
         fi
         local tmpdir srcdir tar_url
         tmpdir=$(mktemp -d)
-        tar_url="https://github.com/Dicklesworthstone/system_resource_protection_script/archive/refs/heads/${build_ref}.tar.gz"
+        if [ "$build_ref" = "main" ] || [ "$build_ref" = "HEAD" ]; then
+            tar_url="https://github.com/Dicklesworthstone/system_resource_protection_script/archive/refs/heads/${build_ref}.tar.gz"
+        else
+            tar_url="https://github.com/Dicklesworthstone/system_resource_protection_script/archive/refs/tags/${build_ref}.tar.gz"
+        fi
         if ! curl -fsSL "$tar_url" | tar xz -C "$tmpdir"; then
             rm -rf "$tmpdir"; return 1
         fi
